description: An agent is listing a commercial building for sale and needs to create a comprehensive marketing package (offering memorandum).

nodes.task_description: Gather all property information: financials, rent roll, site plan, photos, and market data.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a complete set of data for the property.

nodes.task_description: Use a template to create the offering memorandum, populating it with the gathered data and analysis.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a professional and detailed marketing package.

nodes.task_description: Create a confidentiality agreement for interested parties to sign before receiving the full package.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent drafts a standard confidentiality agreement.
